columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each customer.

columns.name: object
columns.description: Type of object, always 'customer'.

columns.name: number
columns.description: Customer number in a specific format.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the customer.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Email address of the customer.

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of customer, either a company or a person.

columns.name: autopay
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is enrolled in autopay.

columns.name: autopay_delay_days
columns.description: Delay in days for autopay, if applicable.

columns.name: payment_terms
columns.description: Payment terms agreed with the customer.

columns.name: attention_to
columns.description: Contact person for the customer, if applicable.

columns.name: address1
columns.description: Primary address line of the customer.

columns.name: address2
columns.description: Secondary address line of the customer.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the customer is located.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State where the customer is located.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.description: Postal code of the customer's location.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country code of the customer's location.

columns.name: language
columns.description: Preferred language of the customer.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency used by the customer for transactions.

columns.name: phone
columns.description: Phone number of the customer.

columns.name: chase
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is being chased for payments.

columns.name: chasing_cadence
columns.description: Cadence of chasing the customer for payments.

columns.name: next_chase_step
columns.description: Next step in the chase process for the customer.

columns.name: credit_hold
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is on credit hold.

columns.name: credit_limit
columns.description: Credit limit assigned to the customer.

columns.name: owner
columns.description: Owner of the customer account.

columns.name: taxable
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is taxable.

columns.name: tax_id
columns.description: Tax identification number of the customer.

columns.name: avalara_entity_use_code
columns.description: Avalara entity use code for tax purposes.

columns.name: avalara_exemption_number
columns.description: Avalara exemption number for tax purposes.

columns.name: parent_customer
columns.description: Parent customer, if applicable.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Additional notes about the customer.

columns.name: sign_up_page
columns.description: Sign-up page for the customer.

columns.name: sign_up_url
columns.description: Sign-up URL for the customer.

columns.name: statement_pdf_url
columns.description: URL to the PDF statement for the customer.

columns.name: ach_gateway
columns.description: ACH gateway used by the customer.

columns.name: cc_gateway
columns.description: Credit card gateway used by the customer.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the customer was created.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the customer was last updated.

columns.name: payment_source_json
columns.description: JSON object containing payment source information.

columns.name: taxes_json
columns.description: JSON object containing tax information.

columns.name: metadata_json
columns.description: JSON object containing additional metadata.
